---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for DANCE
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? Is your feature request related to a
specific use case (a new dataset, a new model variant, a missing config knob)?

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you've thought about, and why you prefer the one above.

## Additional context

Any references, papers, related issues, or code snippets that would help us
scope the change.
